properties.name: Penacook Lake (drinking water source)
properties.note: Primary supply; ~362-368 acres, ~1.5 billion gal accessible, safe yield 2.5 MGD; avg demand ~3.8 MGD. Class A water.

properties.name: Hutchins Street Water Treatment Plant (53 Hutchins St)
properties.note: 10 MGD design capacity (built 1974); treats ~4 MGD avg, ~5.5 MGD summer. Treats Penacook Lake water for ~12,000 connections via 172 mi of main.

properties.name: Contoocook River Pump Station (backup water supply)
properties.note: Backup raw-water source during low lake levels; production capacity 7.5 MGD.

properties.name: Pembroke Well Field (emergency groundwater)
properties.note: Emergency groundwater source adjacent to the Soucook River in Pembroke; 1 MGD capacity, 4 wells up to ~700 gpm combined. Outside Concord bbox (SE).

properties.name: Concord water storage tanks (system-wide)
properties.note: Five storage tanks totaling 7.5 million gallons across the distribution system for pressure regulation and emergency reserve. Representative point near WTP; individual tank sites not enumerated in public source.

properties.name: Hall Street Wastewater Treatment Plant (125 Hall St)
properties.note: ~10.1 MGD design flow, ~25 MGD peak (built 1979); treats ~4 MGD avg. Two 742,000-gal primary clarifiers. Serves Concord + parts of Bow; discharges to Merrimack.

properties.name: Penacook Wastewater Treatment Plant (7 Penacook St)
properties.note: 1.2 MGD treatment capacity; treats ~0.3 MGD avg via two sequencing batch reactors (SBR, converted 2005). Discharges to Merrimack River.
